calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Patricia Abalos #13128 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner/Parent, Vin Chi Quan, is appearing in propria persona on behalf of the three Minor children, Anh Thuyen Quan, My Thuyen Quan, and Hue Thuyen Quan.

Petitioner/Parent, Ha Lu, is not present.

Cantonese Interpreter, Jenny Yao, is present to interpret for Vin Chi Quan.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name of a minor. Vin Chi Quan is sworn and examined by the Court through the Cantonese interpreter.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the change of name of the Minors at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minors to: Annie Quan, May Quan, and Cynthia Quan. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
